text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, November 10. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the lawn mower is having issues starting. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Automations are great when they work. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've noted the plans. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
